## Summary

Fixes all remaining workbench layout issues:

1. **Search Queue + Queue pill** — now on the **same row** using `justify-between` (label left, pill right)
2. **Title descenders** — "g" letters no longer clipped (`lineHeight: 1.6`)
3. **Reset Queue position** — moved to `right-[622px]` directly beside TrustedPath
4. **WIDEN gap** between tags row (SHOULD/SCENE CONSTRUCTION/PASSAGE) and task title row (`pt-4`)
5. **Rows 1+2 tighter** — Diagnosis & Guardrails header compressed (`py-1`, `mt-0.5`)
6. **Queue counter spacing** — `Queue  1/11` with proper en-space separator

## Scope

- `components/revision/ReviseCockpitClientCompactV3.tsx` — sidebar search/pill layout, detail header structure, title line-height
- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — Reset Queue button positioning
